sgTip: Auron's Power Break is essential for Gui's arms — they deal heavy damage and heal Gui if left alive.

subLocations.name: Mushroom Rock Road
subLocations.prose: The road to Operation Mi'ihen — Crusaders hand out items as you climb the switchbacks. Ride the Yevon platforms up each tier; there's a hidden path west of the second platform leading down to the Serene Armlet. Primer X is at the gate area near the Precipice. Operation Mi'ihen fails — this is a narrative beat with no good outcome, but you'll get the aftermath scene either way depending on what you said to Gatta earlier.

bosses.strategy: Start with Lulu, Wakka, and Yuna, exclusively targeting the head. When the head begins to move, counter the incoming attack with any long-range attack or spell — if you can't interrupt it, have Esuna ready for the deadly Venom poison. Save Overdrives and both of Yuna's aeons until the head is nearly dead, then use them to finish the head and damage other parts at the same time. After the head falls, bring in Auron and Kimahri to pound the body — take out any surviving arms first since they regenerate every third turn and protect the body. After the apparent defeat a second phase follows, but it's much weaker and Seymour fights alongside you; this is the only opportunity to see Seymour's Overdrive.
